6.1.1Low Level Contact ResistanceThe low level contact resistance measurement is made from the solder tail of the receptacle to the soldering point of the plug. 6.1.2Insulation ResistanceBoth unmated and Mated connectors, apply 100V DC for 1 minute at sea level between adjacent terminal or ground. In accordance with EIA-364-21.100 MΩ Min (initial).
